meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Speed Up Onboarding with AI Tools
content.seo_description: Stop losing hours to manual setup. Use this expert checklist for AI-driven user onboarding to accelerate development speed using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Slow development speed often stems from manual, repetitive onboarding configurations. By automating user authentication, database schema initialization, and environment setup using Antigravity and Claude Code, you can slash setup time by 80%. This approach ensures consistent, production-ready onboarding that impresses clients while preserving your billable hours.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank terminal, the client's deadline looming like a shadow. You know the architecture, but the friction of setting up user onboarding—auth flows, database relations, and state management—is eating your day. It is the silent killer of project velocity, turning a high-margin freelance gig into a slog of repetitive boilerplate code.

But what if you could treat onboarding as a commodity? By leveraging modern AI-native development tools, you can transform hours of manual configuration into a streamlined, automated pipeline. This isn't just about writing code faster; it's about building a repeatable machine that lets you ship complex features while your competitors are still configuring their login screens.

steps.title: Define the Auth Schema
steps.description: Establish a robust identity foundation. We define user roles and profile fields immediately to avoid refactoring later.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a scalable user authentication schema with roles for Admin, Editor, and Viewer using Prisma and NextAuth patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --schema prisma/schema.prisma --context 'Generate user role model'

steps.title: Automate Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Create a multi-step onboarding wizard that captures user data and triggers initial database population.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React-based multi-step onboarding form component with Zod validation and state persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file src/components/OnboardingWizard.tsx --prompt 'Implement step-by-step state management'

steps.title: Configure Database Hooks
steps.description: Trigger automated tasks—like sending a welcome email—the moment a user completes their onboarding profile.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a server-side hook that triggers an email notification and sets user status to 'active' on database insert.

steps.title: Build Automated Testing
steps.description: Ensure your onboarding flows don't break during future updates by implementing automated end-to-end tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Playwright test cases for the full user onboarding journey, including success and failure states.

steps.title: Final Deployment Sync
steps.description: Package the onboarding module as a reusable micro-service for your next freelance project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the onboarding module into a standalone library with clean documentation and configuration exports.

pro_tips: Always use Zod for runtime schema validation on onboarding forms to prevent bad data from reaching your production database.
Implement a 'soft-onboarding' approach where users can access limited features before completing the full profile to increase conversion.
Use environment variables to toggle onboarding steps during development so you don't have to fill out the form for every test run.
Leverage Claude Code's memory feature to store your preferred coding style, ensuring consistent output across all your projects.
Never hardcode onboarding redirects; use a configuration object that can be updated via the database to change flows without redeploying.
content.next_steps: After completing this checklist, integrate your onboarding module into a CI/CD pipeline to automate deployments and begin building your next client feature using the same modular architecture.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the boilerplate and start building the future. By standardizing your onboarding process, you free up your creative energy for the features that actually get you paid. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
